# Guestbook

> A live demo of Artifact Studio: a shared guestbook plus a per-visitor private note, both persisted in the managed KV backend with no server code.

This is a multi-file React app (esm.sh, no build step) hosted on Artifact Studio. It exists to show two persistence modes side by side.

## Routes
- `/` — the guestbook UI

## Data API (managed KV, same origin)
- `PUT/GET /api/kv/entries/<id>` — shared entries `{ name, message, at }`. No `X-End-User` header → visible to everyone.
- `GET /api/kv/entries` — list all shared entries.
- `PUT/GET /api/kv/notes/me` — a private note `{ text }`. Sent with an `X-End-User` header (a per-visitor secret in localStorage) → scoped to that visitor only.
- All calls send `X-Data-Key` (the per-app data key).

## Notes for agents
- Shared vs private is purely whether the `X-End-User` header is present.
- No auth/login: the end-user id is a per-device capability, not an account.
